headline: RTX Expands F-35 Engine Role While Advancing Open Source Cyber Defense
summary: RTX subsidiary BBN Technologies released Maude-HCS, an open-source toolkit for modeling and validating covert communication networks to support cyber defense efforts. Pratt & Whitney, another RTX unit, received a multibillion-dollar contract for F135 engine production tied to the F-35 Joint Strike Fighter program. For investors looking at NYSE:RTX, these updates add fresh context to a stock that last closed at $196.21 and has returned 69.9% over the past year and 180.3% over the past five...
